name: Kim Chee#1
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cabbage into pieces 1 inch long and 1 inch wide.
2. Sprinkle 2 tablespoons salt on the cabbage and mix well. Let sit for 15 minutes.
3. Cut green onions and tops into 1 1/2 inch lengths, then cut lengthwise into thin slices.
4. Wash the salted cabbage three times with cold water; drain.
5. Add the onions, garlic, chili, ginger, and one tablespoon of salt to the cabbage.
6. Cover with water and mix well.
7. Cover the container and let stand for a few days.
8. Taste the mixture every day. When it is fermented and acidic enough, cover and refrigerate up to 2 weeks. Makes one quart.
